compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add /dso:onboarding to CLAUDE.md Quick Reference table and document new onboarding behaviors
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
testing_mode: GREEN (Unit Test Exemption: no conditional logic, change-detector only, instruction file boundary)

Files: CLAUDE.md

Changes:
1. Add '| Set up DSO for a new project | /dso:onboarding |' row to Quick Reference table (after /dso:architect-foundation row)
2. After the Architecture section sub-agent guard paragraph ending 'Tests: tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh', append a new sentence block describing onboarding behaviors:
   - Step 0 dep pre-scan (bash 4.0+, coreutils, git -- non-blocking; optional: ast-grep, semgrep)
   - Phase N of Y counter display (Y decreases when optional template phases are skipped)
   - Integration setup: Jira section 8, Figma section 9 (config-gated: design.figma_collaboration), Confluence section 10 (config-gated: confluence.enabled) -- all skippable
   - Natural-language preplanning question (run autonomously vs. check in at each decision)

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] CLAUDE.md Quick Reference table contains /dso:onboarding entry
  Verify: grep -q '/dso:onboarding' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions dep pre-scan/Step 0 behavior
  Verify: grep -qE 'dep.*scan|pre-scan|Step 0' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions Phase N of Y counter
  Verify: grep -qE 'Phase N of Y|phase counter|Phase [0-9]+ of' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions optional integration setup (Figma and Confluence config-gated)
  Verify: grep -qiE 'figma.*config|confluence.*config|design\.figma_collaboration|confluence\.enabled' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions natural-language preplanning autonomy question
  Verify: grep -qiE 'autonomous|autonomously|interactively' CLAUDE.md

Note: design-notes.md and KNOWN-ISSUES.md evaluated -- no onboarding-specific updates required.
